subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached the Wronged One, and from it We have inhaled the fragrance of thy love for God, the Lord of all worlds. We beseech God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک لدی المظلوم و وجدنا منه عرف حبک لله رب العالمین نسئل الله ان
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
